mcp_surface_audit.tool_search_query: finance interest rate debt collection Korea MCP 금융 금리 변제충당 채권추심
mcp_surface_audit.korean_law_discover_tools_intent: 금융 이자 채권추심 변제충당 법정이율 금융감독원 한국은행 기준금리
mcp_surface_audit.korean_law_discover_tools_result: no direct finance-specific tool; legal, precedent, interpretation, utility, and statistics-link categories are available

official_public_source_candidates.adoption_rule: Prefer Korean-law MCP lawId/MST/article refs for deterministic resources; use law.go.kr URL as external human-readable source.
Use as procedure reference only; action packets remain non-executing and must not generate filing payloads.
Use as regulatory/consumer-protection context; do not treat homepage guidance as a substitute for statute or case-law authority.

use_for: macro/reference-rate context where contract/ledger data cites benchmark rates
official_public_source_candidates.adoption_rule: Use only when a claim record explicitly depends on benchmark-rate context; statutory interest remains law-source driven.

finance_model_gaps_to_plan.description: Finance fixtures and decisions should carry source_version/effective_date metadata for legal interest, maximum interest, and benchmark-rate references.
Payment allocation should cite 민법 제476조 through 제479조 and preserve disputed or contract-overridden allocation as review-required.
Maximum interest review should distinguish statutory cap source, 대통령령 cap parameter source, and case/contract-specific applicability.
Court procedure sources can explain paperwork or route context, but action packets must stay advisory and non-executing.

decision: Proceed without a dedicated finance MCP for this wave. Use Korean-law MCP for statute/citation grounding, official web/public sources for human-readable source channels, and freeze all adopted finance refs into static repo resources and tests.
